title: Cookie Clicker
description: Click a cookie. Earn cookies. Use cookies to get autoclickers. Get more cookies. Repeat.

title: Tetris
description: Litterally just tetris. If you don't know how to play, you are not a gamer.

title: Snake
description: Control a snake to eat food and grow longer without hitting walls or yourself. A classic arcade game that tests your reflexes and strategic thinking!

title: Pac-Man
description: Navigate mazes, eat dots, and avoid ghosts in this classic arcade game. Collect power pellets to turn the tables on your ghostly pursuers!

title: Chess
description: Strategic board game for two players on a checkered board. Plan your moves carefully and outmaneuver your opponent to achieve checkmate!

title: Solitaire
description: Classic card game where you arrange cards in descending order by alternating colors. A relaxing puzzle game perfect for unwinding!

title: Asteroids
description: Pilot a spaceship through an asteroid field, shooting rocks and avoiding collisions. A classic space shooter that tests your reflexes!

title: Pong
description: The classic two-player game where you control paddles to hit a ball back and forth. Simple yet addictive gameplay!

title: Checkers
description: Strategic board game where you move pieces diagonally to capture your opponent's pieces. Plan ahead to win!

title: Minesweeper
description: Uncover squares without hitting mines using numerical clues. A logic puzzle that requires careful deduction!

title: Space Invaders
description: Defend Earth from waves of alien invaders in this classic arcade shooter. Move left and right while shooting at descending enemies!

title: Sudoku
description: Fill a 9x9 grid with digits so that each column, row, and 3x3 section contains all digits from 1 to 9. A number puzzle that challenges logic!

title: Breakout
description: Control a paddle to bounce a ball and break bricks at the top of the screen. Clear all bricks to advance to the next level!

title: Tower Defense
description: Build towers along a path to defend against waves of enemies. Strategically place different types of towers to stop the invasion!

title: Frogger
description: Help a frog cross busy roads and rivers by timing movements perfectly. Avoid cars, trucks, and water hazards in this classic arcade game!
